paper_title: DQ-BART: Efficient Sequence-to-Sequence Model via Joint Distillation and Quantization

raw_extraction.innovation: We propose a joint distillation and quantization framework to compress sequence-to-sequence models by transferring knowledge from a full-precision teacher model to a quantized and distilled low-precision student model, achieving up to 27.7x model footprint reduction with minimal performance drop
raw_extraction.application: Text summarization, long-form question answering, machine translation
raw_extraction.research_problem: Efficient deployment of large-scale pre-trained sequence-to-sequence models in resource-constrained scenarios due to high computational and memory demands during inference
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Text summarization, long-form question answering, machine translation
